name: fahhhh-screamer
description: Screams the FAhhhh meme when your code errors! Audio alert for failed builds, syntax errors, task failures & debug crashes. Works on Windows, macOS & Linux.

fahhhhScreamer.enabled.description: Globally enable or disable the FAhhhh Screamer extension.

fahhhhScreamer.volume.description: Volume for the scream sound (0.0 = silent, 1.0 = max). Note: Volume control is only supported on macOS (uses afplay).

fahhhhScreamer.soundFile.description: Path to a custom sound file (.mp3 or .wav) to play instead of the bundled FAhhhh sound. Leave empty to use the default. Supports ~ for home directory (e.g. ~/sounds/meme.mp3).

fahhhhScreamer.playOnDiagnostics.description: Scream when a new red squiggle (syntax/type error) appears while you type.

fahhhhScreamer.playOnSave.description: Scream when you save a file that still has errors.

fahhhhScreamer.playOnTaskFailure.description: Scream when a VS Code task (build, test, etc.) exits with a non-zero error code.

fahhhhScreamer.playOnDebuggerCrash.description: Scream when the debugger halts due to an unhandled exception in your app.
